title: pelargonium × polygrammon
intro: Pelargonium × polygrammon, also known as Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and stress, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oils, teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
